title: Call with Nonas
html:
December 2025 Apple Note from Yahir containing only a com.apple.m4a-audio placeholder — a phone-call recording with "Nonas" (likely grandmother) that didn't re-import as audio. Body has no text. Companion to the audio-orphan pattern in 2026 01 07 call with emily stevens.

yahir gonzalez · austin tx · 2026 01 07 call with emily stevens
